final.prompt:
Use case: cinematic support footage for the preserve quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
Primary request: a half-finished commercial development site sitting quiet at cold dawn, with wrapped materials, unfinished concrete, fencing, and idle equipment
Scene/background: cloudy dawn, muddy jobsite, still air before the day begins
Subject: unfinished concrete pads, wrapped materials, temporary fencing, silent crane and idle lift
Action: light wind moves the plastic wrap while puddles ripple across the ground
Camera: slow lateral move, 35mm, smooth and deliberate
Lighting/mood: gray dawn, cautious, restrained, realistic
Color palette: concrete gray, muted teal, rust, wet asphalt, pale sky
Style/format: filmic, natural grain, grounded industrial realism
Timing/beats: steady twelve-second glide with no abrupt action
Constraints: no logos, no text, no people, no unsafe physics
Avoid: jitter; flicker; hyperactive weather; readable signs; surreal cranes
